description: Statuses are wrong: Done (should stay), Blocked (may resolve if code is valid), 'Ready' (invalid). Tests that evdb-diff respects Done, reviews Blocked via Pass 5, and doesn't crash on unknown status.
assertions: done-preserved: slices with status 'Done' must NOT be changed to Review or Planned
blocked-resolved: 'Calculate Commission' was Blocked but Pass 5 found valid code, resolved to Review
invalid-status-handled: 'Withdraw Funds Processor' with status 'Ready' does not crash — treated as non-Done and audited normally
